title: Fix incorrect action path hathbanger/sentinel → hathbanger/pr-sentinel
summary: README.md, examples/sentinel-review.yml, and src/models/openrouter.ts all referenced hathbanger/sentinel@main which doesn't exist. Fixed to hathbanger/pr-sentinel. Opened PR #8. Also fixed subway-openclaw feat/forward-to-channel sentinel.yml (same bad path, copied from docs). Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + OPENAI_API_KEY secrets on subway-openclaw via printf to avoid trailing newline. Re-triggered CI run on subway-openclaw PR #1.

title: Pivot #1: Built LLM-powered issue triage for pr-sentinel. Previously, labeling an issue with  routed to  which required finding matching code via grep — failed silently with "Could not find relevant code" on repos where the issue referenced external paths. New flow: issues route to  by default (new triager.ts), which sends the issue to Claude for root cause analysis, affected areas, investigation steps, questions, and complexity estimates. Second model provides a second opinion (collapsible).  now falls through to triage when no code found. Tested live on subway-dev/subway-relay#4 — Sentinel posted a proper diagnostic comment with 85% confidence. OpenAI second opinion failed (429 quota) but handled gracefully as non-fatal.
